items.title: array/zeros/ones/arange/linspace/eye
items.code:
import numpy as np
print('array:', np.array([1,2,3]))
print('zeros:', np.zeros((2,3)))
print('ones:', np.ones((2,3)))
print('arange:', np.arange(0, 6, 2))
print('linspace:', np.linspace(0, 1, 5))
print('eye:', np.eye(3))

items.title: empty/full
items.code:
import numpy as np
print('empty:', np.empty((2,3)).shape)
print('full:', np.full((2,3), fill_value=7))

items.title: reshape/ravel/transpose
items.code:
import numpy as np
x = np.arange(12)
print('reshape:', x.reshape(3,4))
print('ravel:', x.reshape(3,4).ravel())
print('transpose:', np.transpose(np.arange(6).reshape(2,3)))

items.title: newaxis/expand_dims
items.code:
import numpy as np
x = np.arange(3)
print('newaxis:', x[:, np.newaxis].shape)
print('expand_dims:', np.expand_dims(x, axis=1).shape)

items.title: 基础切片
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1,13).reshape(3,4)
print(a[:2, 1:3])

items.title: 布尔索引
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(10)
print(a[a%2==0])

items.title: 花式索引
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1,13).reshape(3,4)
print(a[[0,2],[1,3]])

items.title: where 条件选择
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(6)
print(np.where(a%2==0, a, -1))

items.title: 加减乘除
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(6).reshape(2,3)
b = np.array([10,20,30])
print('a+b=\n', a+b)
print('a-b=\n', a-b)
print('a*b=\n', a*b)
print('a/b=\n', a/b)

items.title: 幂与裁剪
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.array([-2., -0.5, 0.2, 3.])
print('power:', np.power(a, 2))
print('clip:', np.clip(a, 0, 1))

items.title: 常用聚合
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.arange(1,13).reshape(3,4)
print('sum:', a.sum(), 'mean:', a.mean(), 'std:', a.std(), 'var:', a.var())
print('min:', a.min(), 'max:', a.max())

items.title: 位置与分位
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.array([3,1,7,7,2,9])
print('argmax:', a.argmax(), 'argmin:', a.argmin())
print('ptp:', a.ptp())
print('percentile 25/50/90:', np.percentile(a, [25,50,90]))

items.title: 排序
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.array([3,1,2,3,2,1])
print('sort:', np.sort(a))
print('argsort:', np.argsort(a))

items.title: 去重与计数
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.array([3,1,2,3,2,1])
print('unique:', np.unique(a, return_counts=True))

items.title: 拼接/堆叠
items.code:
import numpy as np
m1 = np.arange(6).reshape(2,3)
m2 = (np.arange(6)+100).reshape(2,3)
print('concatenate axis=0=\n', np.concatenate([m1,m2], axis=0))
print('hstack=\n', np.hstack([m1,m2]))
print('vstack=\n', np.vstack([m1,m2]))

items.title: 分割
items.code:
import numpy as np
x = np.arange(12).reshape(2,6)
print('split:', [a.shape for a in np.split(x, 3, axis=1)])
print('hsplit:', [a.shape for a in np.hsplit(x, 3)])
print('vsplit:', [a.shape for a in np.vsplit(x, 2)])

items.title: 点积/矩阵乘
items.code:
import numpy as np
u = np.array([1,2,3])
w = np.array([4,5,6])
M = np.array([[1.,2.],[3.,4.]])
N = np.array([[5.,6.],[7.,8.]])
print('dot:', np.dot(u,w))
print('matmul:', M @ N)
print('einsum ij,j->i:', np.einsum('ij,j->i', M, np.array([1.,2.])))

items.title: 范数/逆/解方程
items.code:
import numpy as np
A = np.array([[3.,1.],[1.,2.]])
b = np.array([9.,8.])
print('norm:', np.linalg.norm(A))
print('inv:\n', np.linalg.inv(A))
print('solve Ax=b:', np.linalg.solve(A,b))

items.title: 常见分布
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(42)
print('rand:', np.random.rand(2,3))
print('randn:', np.random.randn(2,3))
print('randint:', np.random.randint(0, 10, size=5))

items.title: 采样/打乱
items.code:
import numpy as np
np.random.seed(0)
a = np.arange(6)
print('choice 3:', np.random.choice(a, size=3, replace=False))
b = a.copy(); np.random.shuffle(b); print('shuffle:', b)
print('permutation:', np.random.permutation(a))

items.title: 类型与转换
items.code:
import numpy as np
q = np.array([1.2, 3.7, -2.1])
print('dtype:', q.dtype)
print('astype(int):', q.astype(int))

items.title: 逻辑函数
items.code:
import numpy as np
a = np.array([True, False, True])
print('any:', np.any(a), 'all:', np.all(a))
b = np.array([1, -2, 3])
print('where>0:', np.where(b>0, b, 0))
print('logical_and:', np.logical_and(b>0, b<3))
